title: ficus nemoralis var. trilepis
intro: Ficus nemoralis var. trilepis is a lesser-known variety of fig tree native to India, characterized by its unique, trifoliate leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ficus nemoralis var. trilepis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
